note: Created IScrapedDuckClient interface and ScrapedDuckClient implementation. Client fetches from ScrapedDuck JSON API, handles HTTP errors/timeouts/malformed JSON/unexpected shapes with ScrapedDuckClientException, parses via ScrapedDuckEventParser, and returns IReadOnlyList of ParsedEvent. Refactored ScrapedDuckIngestionService to use IScrapedDuckClient. Updated DI in Program.cs. Updated all 4 test files. All 78 ScrapedDuck tests pass.
